entities.name: Solidifying
entities.context: State for building alignment with moderate consensus (0.5-0.8), positive/stable trajectory, low-moderate divergence

entities.name: Locked-In
entities.context: State of strategic commitment with high consensus (>0.8), stable trajectory, low divergence (<0.3)

entities.name: Consensus
entities.context: Metric measuring agreement level, used to define alignment states

entities.name: Trajectory
entities.context: Metric tracking direction of change (positive, stable) in alignment framework

entities.name: Divergence
entities.context: Metric measuring spread or disagreement in alignment framework

relationships.context: Sequential states in alignment framework - Solidifying progresses toward Locked-In
Solidifying defined by moderate consensus range (0.5-0.8)
Solidifying requires positive or stable trajectory
